orig_text:
When N receives a packet whose IPv6 DA is S and S is a local End.DX2
SID
correct_text:
When N receives a packet whose IPv6 DA is S and S is a local End.DX2V
SID
notes: Looks like a typo in the original text

orig_text:
This SID is advertised in the control plane as
         2001:db8:bbbb:3:100:: with an SRv6 Endpoint Behavior codepoint
         value of 5.
correct_text:
This SID is advertised in the control plane as
         2001:db8:bbbb:3:100:: with an SRv6 Endpoint Behavior codepoint
         value of 4.
